title: Repair measured governance complexity budget
outOfScope: Capability Truth Matrix content and documentation claims
Any release metadata or branch/PR lifecycle changes outside this Work Item

sources.reason: The configured pythonLines ceiling and existing repayment ledger.
Canonical repository-wide complexity measurement used by local and CI gates.
Regression tests require the measured repository state to remain within policy.

riskAssessment.reason: Only the measured pythonLines ceiling and its repayment record change; no runtime behavior changes.

executionDecision.reason: User authorization already covers governance budget repair; the measured CI failure is concrete and bounded.

rawUserRequest: Continue the current documentation Work Item through its complete PR and lifecycle. User authorization covers the full remediation plan and requires no plan item to be skipped.

declaredIntent.summary: Calibrate the confirmed Python complexity ceiling so the current Capability Truth Matrix PR can pass the existing measured CI gate without starting the next planned remediation item.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the ceiling equals the measured repository count plus a bounded reservation and records repayment ownership.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Set max.pythonLines above the measured CI value 36367 with the smallest bounded reservation that passes the gate.
Add one repayment record naming the final Conditional GO plan cleanup Work Item.
make check-governance-complexity passes locally and the policy remains the only non-lifecycle file changed.
The archived Summary records the CI failure, measurement, policy change, and verification result.
guidelines: Preserve repository-wide complexity governance and use the canonical measurement script.
Keep this repair isolated from product/runtime implementation.

intent.problem: PR #244 is blocked by the repository-wide governance complexity check because CI measures 36367 Python lines while policy permits 36350.
constraints: Change only the bounded governance budget and its audit repayment record.
Do not hide or delete source, tests, or historical evidence to lower the measurement.
The final cleanup Work Item remains responsible for repayment.
intent.rationale: A dedicated repair preserves fail-closed CI while making the measured budget explicit and reviewable before the dependent PR is revalidated.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the complete remediation plan, including governance, CI, PR, merge, cleanup, and release work.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
